description: Firewall delete rejects a missing id the same way in both languages, then DELETEs the firewall when fully authorized. Go additionally requires confirm_bypass_dry_run/confirmed_dry_run and its no-confirm text differs (see report).

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_firewall_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
